title: RZN Ads Intelligence Manifest v1
description: Shared output envelope for ads-library workflow packs (Google Ads Transparency Center, Meta Ad Library). Both packs normalize their scraped ads into this canonical, source-discriminated shape so downstream consumers and contract tests can treat them uniformly. Field naming is canonical; per-source aliases are documented in each field. Objects are kept shallow (arrays of flat records) to survive the engine's result-bridge depth cap.

source.description: Which ad library produced this manifest. Discriminates otherwise-identical records.

query.description: The search that produced this manifest, echoed back for provenance and to satisfy the 'records the query in the manifest' acceptance.

advertiser.description: Advertiser name searched for (if the search was by advertiser).

advertiser_id.description: Resolved advertiser id (Google AR... / Meta page id) when enumeration was scoped to one advertiser.

keyword.description: Free-text keyword searched for (if the search was by keyword).

region.description: Region/country the library was scoped to (e.g. 'US'). Required by both UIs before searching.

cap.description: The configured maximum number of ads the run was allowed to collect. Present when pagination was capped.

count.description: Number of ads actually collected in this manifest (== ads.length).

truncated.description: True if more ads were available than the cap allowed and enumeration stopped at the cap.

advertiser_name.description: Top-level advertiser context when the whole manifest is one advertiser's ads.

advertiser_id.description: Top-level advertiser id when the whole manifest is one advertiser's ads.

ads.description: The collected ads. One flat record per ad. Keep records flat (no nested objects) to survive the result-bridge depth cap.

id.description: Stable ad/creative id. Google: creative id (CR...). Meta: ad archive id.

advertiser_id.description: Advertiser id owning this ad. Google AR... / Meta page id.

media_type.description: Canonical creative type. Google 'format' and Meta 'media_type' both map here.

first_shown.description: Date the ad first ran, ISO-ish string as surfaced by the source. Meta 'started_at' maps here.

last_shown.description: Date the ad was last seen running, if surfaced.

copy.description: Ad body/creative text where available (Meta ad copy; Google text-ad copy).

url.description: Canonical link to this ad's detail page in the source library.

preview_url.description: Thumbnail/preview image or video URL for the creative, when exposed on the listing.
